title: Unizulu Online Application 2026 | University of Zululand Apply
metaTitle: Unizulu Online Application 2026 | University of Zululand
metaDescription: Apply to University of Zululand (Unizulu) online for 2026/2027. APS from 18+. Application fee R230. Full guide: how to apply, deadlines, and requirements.
content:
University of Zululand (Unizulu) Online Application 2026

The University of Zululand (Unizulu) is based in KwaDlangezwa, KwaZulu-Natal (near Richards Bay/Empangeni), with a second campus in Durban. Unizulu offers a range of degrees, diplomas, and postgraduate qualifications with accessible entry requirements, particularly for students from northern KwaZulu-Natal.

Unizulu Application Key Dates 2026

EventDate
2027 Applications OpenApril 1, 2026
Application Closing DateSeptember 30, 2026
Results NotificationNovember–December 2026
Academic Year StartsFebruary 2027

How to Apply to Unizulu Online

  1. Visit: www.unizulu.ac.za
  2. Click "Apply Online" or go to the Prospective Students section
  3. Register for an applicant account
  4. Complete the application form — select your programme and campus
  5. Upload documents: Certified ID copy, Grade 11 or 12 results, proof of residence
  6. Pay the application fee: Approximately R230 (verify current fee on Unizulu website)
  7. Submit and keep your reference number

Unizulu APS Requirements by Faculty

FacultyMinimum APSKey Subject Requirements
Science & Agriculture22+Mathematics 3+, Physical Sciences or Life Sciences 3+, English 3+
Commerce, Administration & Law20+English 3+, Mathematics 3+ or Mathematical Literacy 4+
Education20+English 4+, subject specialisation requirements apply
Humanities & Social Sciences18+English 3+, any five subjects
Law (LLB)24+English 4+, any other five subjects at acceptable level

Use our free APS Calculator to check your eligibility for Unizulu.

Unizulu Campuses

CampusLocationNotes
Main Campus (KwaDlangezwa)KwaDlangezwa, near Empangeni, KZNMain campus — all faculties
Durban CampusDurban, KZNBusiness and Commerce programmes

Unizulu Key Facts

  • Full name: University of Zululand
  • Type: Traditional University
  • Province: KwaZulu-Natal
  • Founded: 1960
  • Website: www.unizulu.ac.za
  • Application fee: Approximately R230
  • NSFAS eligible: Yes

NSFAS at Unizulu

University of Zululand is a NSFAS-accredited institution. Students from households with income below R350,000/year may qualify for NSFAS funding. Apply at www.nsfas.org.za from October each year.

Other University Applications in KwaZulu-Natal

If you're considering multiple universities in KZN, also check:

  • How to apply to UKZN
  • How to apply to DUT (Durban University of Technology)
  • How to apply to Mangosuthu University of Technology

Need to improve your APS for Unizulu? StudyBuddy's AI tutor helps Grade 10–12 students improve across all subjects. Start free today.
quickAnswer: Apply to University of Zululand (Unizulu) online at www.unizulu.ac.za. Applications open April 1, 2026 and close September 30, 2026. Application fee is approximately R230. Minimum APS ranges from 18 (Humanities) to 24+ (Law).

faqs.question: How do I apply to Unizulu online?
faqs.answer: Apply online at www.unizulu.ac.za. Go to the Prospective Students section and click 'Apply Online'. Register for an account, complete the application form, upload certified copies of your ID and academic results, and pay the R230 application fee. Applications open around April 1 each year.

faqs.question: What is the minimum APS for University of Zululand?
faqs.answer: University of Zululand minimum APS ranges from 18 (Humanities) to 24+ (Law). Commerce requires 20+, Science & Agriculture requires 22+, and Education requires 20+. Check the Unizulu website for specific programme requirements.

faqs.question: When does Unizulu open applications for 2026?
faqs.answer: Unizulu applications for 2027 intake open approximately April 1, 2026 and close September 30, 2026. Apply as early as possible for competitive programmes. Visit www.unizulu.ac.za to apply online.
